name: riftyxso31
recommendation:
REKOMENDASI PAKET
Paket Starter Digital Presence untuk Coffee Shop

Halo riftyxso31! Terima kasih sudah menghubungi The Micro Agent Company. Saya paham kamu ingin memulai kehadiran digital untuk coffee shop-mu dengan budget terbatas. Untuk di bawah 150k, sayangnya kami belum bisa menyediakan pembuatan website penuh yang berkualitas. Namun, saya punya solusi alternatif yang tetap efektif untuk memulai:

YANG TERMASUK:
- Landing page sederhana 1 halaman menggunakan platform gratis seperti Linktree atau Carrd
- Setup profil Google My Business untuk coffee shop kamu agar mudah ditemukan di Google Maps
- Template desain sederhana untuk Instagram story dan feed
- Konsultasi 30 menit untuk strategi digital marketing awal

ESTIMASI HARGA
Rp 100.000 - Rp 140.000

Atau jika kamu bisa menambah budget menjadi 300k-500k, kami bisa buatkan landing page custom yang lebih profesional dengan domain sendiri, desain khusus sesuai branding coffee shop, dan form pemesanan online.

TIPS TAMBAHAN
Untuk coffee shop, fokus dulu pada Instagram dan Google My Business. Posting foto produk berkualitas secara konsisten lebih efektif daripada langsung buat website mahal. Gunakan budget lebih untuk foto produk profesional yang bisa dipakai di semua platform. Setelah bisnis berkembang, baru invest ke website full feature dengan sistem

name: sd
recommendation:
RECOMMENDED PACKAGE
Premium Website Development with Complete Digital Ecosystem

Based on your substantial budget and focus on the food industry, we recommend a comprehensive website solution that positions your nasi business as a premium brand full digital marketing support. This package includes a custom-built, conversion-optimized website with advanced features like online ordering integration, delivery tracking, menu showcase professional photography, and mobile-first responsive design.

INCLUDES:
- Custom ordering system and payment gateway integration
- Professional food photography and videography session for menu items brand storytelling
- Complete branding package including logo refinement, color palette, and brand guidelines
- SEO optimization with local search focus Google My Business setup
- 3 months of social media management to launch your digital presence
- Copywriting for website content, descriptions, and marketing materials
- Initial Meta Google Ads campaign setup with first month management

ESTIMATED PRICE
15,000,000 - 25,000,000 IDR

This investment covers complete website development, professional content creation, and the foundation ongoing digital marketing success. The range accounts for complexity of features like integrations, number of menu items photographed, and scope of initial advertising campaigns.

EXTRA TIPS
Consider allocating part of your budget for ongoing monthly services after launch. A business thrives with consistent social media presence and active ad management to drive orders Your generous budget also allows for premium videography showing cooking processes or behind-the-scenes content, which performs exceptionally well on social platforms and builds customer trust. Start with strong foundations now scale your digital presence as you grow.
